description: Native Brazilian data for AI agents — CNPJ, CEP, FIPE, holidays, interest rates, banks. The only x402 gateway with first-class LatAm coverage.

cnpj.notes: Brazilian company registry (Receita Federal). 24h cache — registry changes rarely. Pass :cnpj as 14 digits, no punctuation.

cep.notes: Postal code → address (street, neighborhood, city, state, coords). 30-day cache.

bank.notes: Bank info by 3-digit code (e.g. 001 = Banco do Brasil, 341 = Itaú).

fipe-price.notes: Vehicle FIPE price table (cars, motorcycles, trucks). Reference for used-vehicle market in BR.

fipe-brands.notes: List vehicle brands by type (carros, motos, caminhoes).

holidays.notes: Brazilian national holidays for a given year. 30-day cache — fixed schedule.

rates.notes: Current Brazilian interest rates — Selic, CDI, IPCA. 1h cache (updated daily).

rate.notes: Single rate by sigla (Selic, CDI, IPCA).

ddd.notes: Phone area code info: state + list of cities. Useful for lead enrichment.
